Home / Case Studies — TETRA by Corewood

Case Studies

TETRA

The world’s fastest graph database. Sub-millisecond Cypher queries, 30+ algorithms, 2D/3D visualization. Wins 62 of 78 benchmarks vs Neo4j.

GoLang Rust WebAssembly Cypher WebGPU Svelte

Rootstock

A campaign platform enabling citizen scientists to submit data for research, earning points and sweepstake opportunities. Researchers can create data collection campaigns.

GoLang React PostgreSQL gRPC OPA

LandScope

GIS/geospatial platform — MVP to production in 10 weeks.

GoLang React CesiumJS gRPC OpenTelemetry Postgres

Masquer

Real-time data privacy infrastructure. PII detection and masking at read-time.

GoLang ONNX PostgreSQL DeBERTa gRPC

Self-Hosted LLM APIs

Custom LLM inference engine with GPU kernels. R&D / in development.

GoLang CGo Metal CUDA Custom GPU Kernels

Media

Colorado Security Podcast

Founder Mickey discusses secure-by-design needs for the age of LLMs.
